intro: Corysanthes picta, also known as the Picta Corysanthe, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Corysanthes picta include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
